steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content: Two points on the line have the same output: $f(0)=f(7)=2$. Slope $=\dfrac{2-2}{\Delta x}=0$, so $f$ is constant.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: A constant function with value $2$ is $f(x)=2$. That matches choice C — C is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches choice C, $f(x)=2$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore C is correct.
